religiowikicustomizer: Display name of [[Special:ReligiowikiCustomizer]] used in [[Special:SpecialPages]] and as the message key convention for a special page's canonical name.
religiowikicustomizer-title: Page title shown at the top of Special:ReligiowikiCustomizer.
religiowikicustomizer-field-primary: Label for the primary/link color field.
religiowikicustomizer-field-secondary: Label for the secondary/accent color field.
religiowikicustomizer-field-background: Label for the page background color field.
religiowikicustomizer-field-surface: Label for the elevated-surface (cards, sidebar boxes) color field.
religiowikicustomizer-field-border: Label for the border color field.
religiowikicustomizer-field-text: Label for the main text color field.
religiowikicustomizer-field-textmuted: Label for the muted/secondary text color field.
religiowikicustomizer-field-fontfamily: Label for the font-family field (raw CSS font-family value).
religiowikicustomizer-field-fontsizebase: Label for the base font-size field (raw CSS value).
religiowikicustomizer-field-maxwidth: Label for the max content width field (raw CSS value).
religiowikicustomizer-help-colorformat: Help text shown under each color field explaining the expected hex format.
religiowikicustomizer-reset: Label of the button that deletes saved settings, falling back to the extension's built-in defaults.
religiowikicustomizer-saved: Success message shown after saving the form.
religiowikicustomizer-error-invalidcolor: Validation error shown when a color field isn't a valid hex color.
